_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Track status of information requests, including those processed as collection requests and production requirements, using established procedures.
reference_document_element_description: Process data access requests per defined procedures, including request validation, approval routing, provisioning, and access log documentation.
comments: DCWF task superset of WIDAI DG domain. DG-T-015 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RC-T-006 (RC, cosine: 0.591), SP-T-003 (SP, cosine: 0.558).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.9/10 (raw 0.590). Shared vocabulary: [procedures, requests]. DCWF-only terms [collection, established, information, processed, production, requirements] vs WIDAI-only terms [access, approval, data, defined, documentation, log] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.887 (P=0.891, R=0.883). Balanced P/R — the 17-word DCWF element and 17-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (98.8%). "Track status of information requests, including those processed as collection re" and "Process data access requests per defined procedures, including request validatio" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.650 > STS 0.590 (gap +0.060). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [procedures, requests] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 14.3%. Shared tokens: [procedures, requests]. DCWF-only: [collection, established, information, processed, production, requirements]. WIDAI-only: [access, approval, data, defined, documentation, log].
